name: Bacalao a La Vizcaina (Codfish Fricassee)
recipeIngredient: 4 medium red potatoes, peeled and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the codfish fillets in a pot and cover with water. Allow the fish to soak all day if possible; changing the water several times will help extract salt.
2. Boil the quartered potatoes until tender.
3. Prepare the sauce by combining garlic, bay leaf, oregano, ground pepper, bijol, cumin, white wine, olive oil, and tomato sauce in a large pot. Cook over medium-high heat for 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Add the soaked codfish to the sauce and reduce heat. Simmer for 5-10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Incorporate the cooked potatoes into the dish and simmer for another 10 minutes if reducing liquid is desired.
6. Garnish with chopped pimientos before serving.
Note: Bijol is a natural food coloring available at Latin and ethnic food markets.
